label: Asymmetric link data
description: Settings for asymmetric link rendering. Maps to Verse.AsymmetricLinkData in RimWorld source.

linkFlags.label: Link flags
linkFlags.description: Flags controlling which adjacent thing types this asymmetric link connects to. Each <li> is one flag value.

linkToDoors.label: Link to doors
linkToDoors.description: Whether this asymmetric link connects to adjacent door things.

drawDoorBorderEast.label: Draw door border east
drawDoorBorderEast.description: Border overlay data drawn on the east side of a linked door.

drawDoorBorderWest.label: Draw door border west
drawDoorBorderWest.description: Border overlay data drawn on the west side of a linked door.
